forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula this evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures 25 to 32.
High
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 25.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning and afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower this evening. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures 27 to 34.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the north in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely this evening. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to high 20s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and early afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early morning then becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 30.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Cloudy. Very high chance of light showers. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then tending southerly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Patchy morning fog in the south. Slight chance of a shower in the south in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then tending southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late evening. Daytime maximum temperatures 24 to 29.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 8 [Very High]
Cloudy. Very high chance of light showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:40pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 15 and 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the high 20s.

Mostly sunny. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 4:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]
Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 26.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 28.

Mostly sunny. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly in the middle of the day then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 5:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 10 [Very High]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. Winds southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the morning then becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 22 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 27.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers west of Nullarbor, high chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Ceduna. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the late morning and early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures 24 to 33.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 5:10pm, UV Index predicted to reach 10 [Very High]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching 22 to 27.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the south, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the early afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low to mid 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 5:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending south to southeasterly in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 18 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 19 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely late this afternoon and evening. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 26 to 31.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:10am to 5:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 9 [Very High]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the east coast, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Partly cloudy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 14 and 17 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. High chance of rain west of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the far west. Heavy falls possible north of Coober Pedy. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures 26 to 35.
Moderate
Sun protection 10:00am to 5:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 11 [Extreme]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding north of Coober Pedy. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 21 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.

Cloudy. High chance of showers east of Stuart Highway, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Coober Pedy. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 16 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 17 and 20 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Leigh Creek this evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border late this afternoon and evening. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then tending northeast to southeasterly in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures in the mid to high 30s.
Moderate
Sun protection 9:50am to 5:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 11 [Extreme]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain west of Leigh Creek, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Leigh Creek in the late afternoon and evening, possibly severe with heavy rain which may lead to flash flooding. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h before dawn then tending northeast to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to 21 to 27 with daytime temperatures reaching 26 to 37.

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain north of Leigh Creek, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northeast to southeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 25 with daytime temperatures reaching 24 to 33.

Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Leigh Creek. Winds east to southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending south to southeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 18 and 24 with daytime temperatures reaching 25 to 30.
